name: Kartoffelsalat Mit Biermarinade (Potato Salad/Beer Dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in a medium-size saucepan until just tender.
2. Peel and slice the potatoes.
3. Fry bacon until crisp. Break into small pieces and mix with onion, celery, and salt. Set aside.
4. In a small saucepan, stir melted butter and flour until blended. Add mustard and sugar. Slowly stir in beer and Tobasco sauce. Bring to boil, stirring constantly.
5. Pour the dressing over potatoes. Sprinkle with parsley. Toss lightly and let stand for 1 hour.
6. Add the bacon mixture and toss gently before serving.
